workflow: Workflow B — Direct keyword → page → generate (Template DT-A country guides + DT-E treatment page)
instructions: Run steps 1→5 for each page. Treatment page first, then country guides.
Copy keyword id from step 1 into step 2. Copy page id from step 2 into steps 3–5.

body.keyword: what is dental tourism implants veneers
body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template DT-E (~1,800 words). Medically reviewed entity page. REQUIRED H2s: (1) What Is Dental Tourism?, (2) How Dental Implants Work, (3) Veneers Explained, (4) Crowns and Materials, (5) All-on-4 Overview, (6) Why Patients Travel Abroad, (7) What MedCover Patients Report, (8) Where Available, (9) Glossary, (10) FAQ, (11) External Resources. Schema: MedicalProcedure, HowTo. requiresMedicalReviewer: true. Link to all country guides.

body.title: What Is Dental Tourism? Implants, Veneers & Crowns Explained
body.metaTitle: Dental Tourism Explained — Implants, Veneers, Crowns | MedCover
body.metaDescription: Dental tourism covers implants, veneers, and crowns abroad. Learn procedures, costs, trip planning, and why patients travel for dental care.

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template DT-A (~1,500 words). Turkey is a leading dental tourism destination. REQUIRED H2s per Template Registry DT-A. Cost €300–€600/implant. Istanbul is primary city. Link to /costs/dental-turkey-cost-2026, /guides/turkey/istanbul-dental-guide, /treatments/dental.

body.title: Dental Care in Turkey: What Real Patients Told Us
body.metaTitle: Dental Care in Turkey 2026 — Costs & Clinics | MedCover
body.metaDescription: Dental care in Turkey from €300 per implant. Leading destination for implants, veneers, and all-on-4 with verified clinic data.

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template DT-A (~1,500 words). EU-regulated clinics in Barcelona and Madrid. Cost €500–€900/implant. Link to cost page, city guides, treatment page.

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template DT-A (~1,500 words). Athens primary hub. Cost €400–€750/implant. Link to cost page, Athens city guide, treatment page.
